description: Get dressed in these thong sandals from catwalk for a wonderful ethnic look. The heavily beaded design lends a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Wide synthetic straps in a thong design for comfort Heavily embellished design for added style Soft leather lining for all day comfort Midsole Suede covered ergonomic footbed made out of resin for added style and durability Outsole TPU outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot and textured heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
